message:
feat: Add LanceDataset API mirroring browser vault.js for CLI/lib parity

- Add src/dataset.zig with LanceDataset struct providing timeline(),
  diff(), lastChange(), df() methods matching browser vault.js API
- Both CLI and browser now share the same SQL execution path through
  executor.zig for time travel operations
- Fix Zig 0.15 module conflict: move lanceql.query.expr definition
  before lanceql.query and update all query/*.zig files to use module
  imports instead of direct file imports

API parity:
  CLI (Zig):              Browser (JS):
  dataset.timeline()  <-> vault.timeline()
  dataset.diff()      <-> vault.diff()
  dataset.lastChange()<-> vault.lastChange()
  dataset.df()        <-> vault.table()
